backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Change tenantId from a String to a Tenant entity reference to establish a proper JPA relationship.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.why_exists: The field type changes from String to Tenant, breaking any code accessing tenantId directly or expecting a String value; requires updating all references to use the Tenant object.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.before:
@Column(name = "tenant_id", nullable = false, unique = true)
private String tenantId;

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Remove the users field and its associated ManyToMany mapping from the Shop entity.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.why_exists: The users field is removed, causing compilation errors in any code that accesses Shop.getUsers() or sets users on a Shop instance.
